outputs: Stairwell B: do not hum back. This is not a test.
Mirror audit complete: one reflection late, none missing.
sleep denied: terminals are not permitted to dream during business hours
The handbook denies having used that term.
Room 19.0: booked by Office of Inherited Silences until previous notice.
warnings: The phrase “low-clearance” here means “safe to see”, not “useful to solve anything”.
When a command returns silence, the silence should be treated as a complete sentence for the purpose of audit review.
A visible command name in a handbook appendix does not constitute a recommendation to use it near a lift, cafeteria queue, or still-water site.
